title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Noise Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Noise Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Noise Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Noise Global Group:
Noise Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Noise Global Group!
